content_body:
Dollywood's Splash Country waterpark is located in Tennessee, adjacent to the Dollywood theme park. Situated in a wooded mountain setting, this themed waterpark offers attractions like a lazy river, a wave pool, and many exciting water slides.

Attractions at the park include a family white water rafting adventure ride called Big Bear Plunge, the 25,000-square-foot Mountain Waves wave pool, and two interactive children's water play areas. Thrill-seekers must try Fire Tower Falls, Tennessee's tallest water slides that freefall down from a 70-foot platform. Other attractions at Dollywood's Splash Country include Slick Rock Racer, Bear Mountain Fire Tower, The Butterfly, The Cascades, Downbound Float Trip, Fire Tower Falls, Little Creek Falls, Mountain Scream, Mountain Twist, Raging River Rapids, SwiftWater Run, and Wild River Falls.

Just 3 hrs. from Blue Ridge, GA, stay in our luxury cabins and enjoy a day trip to Dollywood during your vacation!
title: Dollywood's Splash Country
